content: modules/promises/  Table of contents This directory tree is used for distributing promise modules and supporting libraries. Files in this directory have an executable copy in $(sys.workdir)/modules/packages/ and take precedence over modules in the vendored directory. Package modules in the vendored sub-directory are rendered into $(sys.workdir)/modules/packages if no customized copy is found.
